title: Record Graph
description: Base contract for a graph of related Salesforce records. This file is the canonical shape; the per-object field/picklist constraints under $defs are GENERATED from SObject describe (see DESIGN.md build steps) and should not be hand-edited.

clientRequestId.description: Idempotency key — replays with the same id are de-duplicated.

templateId.description: Optional: the template this graph was expanded from.

alias.description: Local id, unique within the graph. Children reference parents by this.

objectApiName.description: SObject API name, e.g. Quote, QuoteLineItem.

id.description: Salesforce record Id — required for update/delete, optional for upsert.

parentAlias.description: alias of the parent node in this graph.

parentField.description: FK field on this object that points at the parent, e.g. QuoteId.

fields.description: Field API name -> value. Allowed keys + picklist values are constrained per-object by the describe-generated sub-schemas under $defs (e.g. quoteFields).

$defs._comment_generated: Everything below is illustrative of what the describe generator emits. Replace at build time.

quoteFields.description: GENERATED from describe('Quote'). Picklist enums reflect live org values.
